description: A connector is pure data: it lines the columns of a common TMS (transportation management) shipment export up with the logistics-freight pack's fields. Rename the left side to match your export's headers.

value_hints.freight_cost: strip $ and commas — Aris reads money either way
value_hints.on_time_pct: a number like 80.0, not the string '80%'
value_hints.Service: FTL / LTL / Reefer / Intermodal all map straight through to mode

note: No code here — a connector is a column-to-field map. Your TMS export never leaves your control except as the records you choose to load.
